description: Explicit UI contract for the public marketing /governance route.

page_hero.subtitle: The discipline of the registry is in what it refuses to do. Many adjacent capabilities are reasonable; each one would make the registry a different kind of platform.

bullets.value: A locally-governed catalogue of sovereign AI resources.
Three independent governance signals: provider-verified, sovereignty-reviewed, official-resource.
A hosting provider for any AI resource.

non_negotiables: Page renders PageHero followed by a 2-card .gov-grid; no other body content in v0.4.
Hero crumb uses Unicode middle dot U+00B7: 'Governance · Charter & Review'.
Hero gradient span text is exactly 'without overreach' (no terminating space; period is outside the span).
Card 1 heading is 'What it is'; Card 2 heading is 'What it is not'. Order is fixed.
Card 1 has no Reveal delay; Card 2 has Reveal delay = 120 ms.
Card 1 bullet 2 includes a mono span with text 'air://' and color var(--text) (NOT var(--text-2)).
Card 2 bullet 2 uses Unicode 'not equal to' (U+2260) in 'Listing ≠ endorsement.' — do NOT substitute '!='.
Both cards use the .glass wrapper with padding 28.
Bullet list style: paddingLeft 18, color var(--text-2), fontSize 14, lineHeight 1.65.
No interactive elements on this page in v0.4 — no clicks, no hover-to-detail.
